# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-application
version: 0.1.0

dependencies:
  - name: common-labels
    repository: https://example.com/common-labels-charts
    version: 0.1.0

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-my-application
      labels:
        app: my-application
    spec:
      replicas: 3
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-application
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: my-application
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: my-application
              image: my-application-image:latest
              ports:
                - containerPort: 80
